For campaigns

A creator activation system built for political teams that need polish.

PolitiViral is designed for campaign teams that need a premium creator activation layer, not a broad marketplace. It gives you a cleaner system for briefing, organizing, and preparing creator workstreams that move voters.

Set up your campaignView pilot pricing

Use cases

Persuasion videos, opinion content, interview formats, promo content, and tracked action links.

Audience

Democratic and center-left candidates, PACs, advocacy groups, and aligned organizations.

Direction

Simple enough for rapid launch, polished enough to feel trustworthy in front of stakeholders.

Why it matters

Campaign-ready structure before the outreach chaos starts.

Milestone 1 focuses on the early operating layer your team needs before deep collaboration and billing workflows come online.

Vetting

Start with cleaner creator readiness

Collect structured creator profiles instead of juggling scattered bios, platform notes, and email threads.

Briefing

Align your asks around real campaign outputs

Creator videos, persuasion content, interview clips, opinion takes, promo assets, and tracked actions all belong in one campaign operating flow.

Program ops

Build a creator program that feels intentional

Give campaign teams a polished shell for organization, onboarding, and future expansion without becoming a generic influencer tool.

What your team gets in milestone 1

  • A campaign-specific onboarding flow that captures organization, initiative, budget range, and activation timeline.
  • A dashboard shell tuned for creator program visibility instead of generic creator marketplace browsing.
  • A cleaner starting point for future invite, brief, and tracked-link workflows.
Pilot fit

PolitiViral is especially strong for teams that already believe creators matter but need a more credible operating layer to scale the work.

Campaign launch

Give your creator strategy a product surface that matches the stakes.

Start with campaign onboarding, lock in your creator program basics, and get a dashboard shell designed for political operations.

Create campaign account
BrandBuild

The AI video operating system for multi-model creative teams.

Orchestrate Sora 2, Kling, and Higgsfield through one enterprise workflow for planning, generation, review, and final assembly.

Model strengthsWorkflow logicProduct preview

Guardrails

Keys stay server-side.

Assets stay organized by shot.

Review memory stays attached to every run.

BrandBuild keeps the workflow cinematic on the surface and disciplined underneath.
